title: Anchored Spec — EA Workflow Policy
description: Governance rules for EA artifact lifecycle: workflow variants, path-based enforcement, trivial exemptions, and lifecycle gates.

defaultTypes.description: EA artifact change types that default to this variant

artifacts.description: Ordered list of schema profiles this variant requires

skipSkillSequence.description: If true, skip mandatory skill/ceremony sequence

verificationFocus.description: EA verification checks to emphasize for this variant

include.description: Glob patterns — files matching these require a change artifact

exclude.description: Glob patterns — files matching these are excluded from this rule

requiredDocs.description: EA artifacts that must exist for changes matching this rule

commands.description: Verification commands to run for changes matching this rule

changeRequiredRules.description: Path-based rules that mandate EA change artifacts

trivialExemptions.description: Glob patterns for paths that never require a change artifact

conditions.description: All conditions must be true for chore eligibility

escalationRule.description: What happens when conditions are not met

choreEligibility.description: When a change qualifies as a chore (lightweight workflow)

plannedToActiveRequiresChange.description: Artifact can't go active without an associated change artifact

activeToShippedRequiresCoverage.description: Artifact can't ship without test evidence

deprecatedRequiresReason.description: Artifact can't be deprecated without a reason or replacement

lifecycleRules.description: Machine-enforced EA artifact lifecycle transition gates

extensions.description: Project-specific policy metadata. Not validated by built-in schemas.
